title: ozothamnus obovatus
intro: Ozothamnus obovatus, also known as the white smoke bush, is a flowering shrub native to Australia, characterized by its small white flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ozothamnus obovatus include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used to support immune function and relieve coughs.
